/usr/bin/clang++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -arch x86_64 -bundle -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o ModulusLitePlugin.bundle CMakeFiles/ModulusLitePlugin.dir/ModulusLitePlugin_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ModulusLitePlugin.dir/plugin_main.cpp.o -F/opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib   -L/path/to/ObjectARX2027Mac/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/path/to/ObjectARX2027Mac/lib libModulusLiteCore.a libModulusLiteCAD.a libModulusLiteUI.a -framework CoreFoundation -framework Cocoa libModulusLiteCore.a /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtWidgets.framework/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtGui.framework/QtGui /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtCore.framework/QtCore
